calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Off Calendar

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Karen Fransworth.
Atty. Jame Millar, Esq. for Petitioner: Julio Franco, present as Guardian ad litem for the Minor Claimant: Leslie Franco, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,825.00
A net balance of $5,475.00 to be deposited into a blocked account with CALIFORNIA SAVINGS BANK, 345 CALIFORNIA ST., SF, CA 94104., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
